recommendations.title: Lisbela and the Prisoner
recommendations.overview: Lisbela is a young woman who loves going to the movies. Leléu is a con man, going from town to town selling all sort of things and performing as master of ceremonies for some cheesy numbers, such as the woman who gets transformed into a gorilla. He g

recommendations.title: The Age of Innocence
recommendations.overview: In 19th century New York high society, a young lawyer falls in love with a woman separated from her husband, while he is engaged to the woman's cousin.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Khoobsurat
recommendations.overview: A vibrant, hopelessly romantic physiotherapist meets a handsome young Rajput prince who is the complete opposite of her – and is engaged to someone else.

recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.

recommendations.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
recommendations.overview: Rahul, the director of a successful dance troupe, considers Nisha his best friend, though secretly, she is madly in love with him. He then falls for Pooja, who is engaged to Ajay.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.
